languages.original_text: "If Tecla-Paradigm-13 had approached research with the same zeal she applied to making my life on the station more difficult, she could have been useful for something. Unfortunately, that was not the case. I decided to leave the station at the earliest opportunity, so as not to jeopardise my and Nuncius's efforts. That opportunity turned out to be you."

languages.text: "Если бы Тэкла-Парадигма-13 с таким же рвением подходила к исследованиям, с каким она подошла к усложнению моей жизни на станции, из нее мог бы выйти толк. Увы. Я решил покинуть обитель при первой же возможности, чтобы не ставить под риск наши с Нунциусом труды. Этой возможностью оказались вы".

"If Tecla-Paradigm-13 had approached research with the same zeal she applied to making my life on the station more difficult, she could have been useful for something. Unfortunately, that was not the case. I decided to leave the station at the earliest opportunity, so as not to jeopardise my and Nuncius's efforts. That opportunity turned out to be you."

Я решил покинуть обитель при первой же возможности, чтобы не ставить под риск наши с Нунциусом труды. Этой возможностью оказались вы".

Unfortunately, that was not the case. I decided to leave the station at the earliest opportunity, so as not to jeopardise my and Nuncius's efforts. That opportunity turned out to be you."

"If Tecla-Paradigm-13 had approached research with the same zeal she applied to making my life on the station more difficult, she could have been useful for something. Unfortunately, that was not the case. I decided to leave the station at the earliest opportunity, so as not to jeopardise my and Nuncius's efforts. That opportunity turned out to be you."

"If Tecla-Paradigm-13 had approached research with the same zeal she applied to making my life on the station more difficult, she could have been useful for something. Unfortunately, that was not the case. I decided to leave the station at the earliest opportunity, so as not to jeopardise my and Nuncius's efforts. That opportunity turned out to be you."

languages.text: «Si Tecla-Paradigma-13 hubiera dedicado a mi investigación el mismo fervor que destinaba a dificultar mi vida en la estación, habría sido útil para algo. Por desgracia, ese no fue el caso. Decidí abandonar la estación en cuanto tuviera oportunidad, para no poner en peligro mis esfuerzos y los de Nuncius. Dicha oportunidad resultó ser usted».
languages.original_text: "If Tecla-Paradigm-13 had approached research with the same zeal she applied to making my life on the station more difficult, she could have been useful for something. Unfortunately, that was not the case. I decided to leave the station at the earliest opportunity, so as not to jeopardise my and Nuncius's efforts. That opportunity turned out to be you."

traits.locale_text: «Si Tecla-Paradigma-13 hubiera dedicado a mi investigación el mismo fervor que destinaba a dificultar mi vida en la estación, habría sido útil para algo. Por desgracia, ese no fue el caso. Decidí abandonar la estación en cuanto tuviera oportunidad, para no poner en peligro mis esfuerzos y los de Nuncius. Dicha oportunidad resultó ser usted».

languages.text: “如果泰克拉·帕拉戴姆-13把她用来给我添堵的那股劲儿，投入到研究中，她或许可以有所作为。可惜，事实并非如此。我决定一有机会就离开那座星站，免得拖累我和努恩修斯的心血。而这个机会，正好就是您。”
languages.original_text: "If Tecla-Paradigm-13 had approached research with the same zeal she applied to making my life on the station more difficult, she could have been useful for something. Unfortunately, that was not the case. I decided to leave the station at the earliest opportunity, so as not to jeopardise my and Nuncius's efforts. That opportunity turned out to be you."

traits.locale_text: “如果泰克拉·帕拉戴姆-13把她用来给我添堵的那股劲儿，投入到研究中，她或许可以有所作为。可惜，事实并非如此。我决定一有机会就离开那座星站，免得拖累我和努恩修斯的心血。而这个机会，正好就是您。”

languages.text: « Si Tecla-Paradigme-13 avait mis autant d'énergie dans ses recherches que pour compliquer mon quotidien à bord de la station, elle aurait sans doute pu se montrer utile. Hélas, cela n'a jamais été le cas, c'est pourquoi j'ai décidé de partir dès que l'occasion se présenterait, de façon à ne pas compromettre mes efforts et ceux de Nuncius. Et cette occasion, ce fut vous. »
languages.original_text: "If Tecla-Paradigm-13 had approached research with the same zeal she applied to making my life on the station more difficult, she could have been useful for something. Unfortunately, that was not the case. I decided to leave the station at the earliest opportunity, so as not to jeopardise my and Nuncius's efforts. That opportunity turned out to be you."

traits.locale_text: « Si Tecla-Paradigme-13 avait mis autant d'énergie dans ses recherches que pour compliquer mon quotidien à bord de la station, elle aurait sans doute pu se montrer utile. Hélas, cela n'a jamais été le cas, c'est pourquoi j'ai décidé de partir dès que l'occasion se présenterait, de façon à ne pas compromettre mes efforts et ceux de Nuncius. Et cette occasion, ce fut vous. »

languages.text: "Hätte Tecla-Paradigma-13 mit demselben Eifer geforscht, mit dem sie mir auf der Station das Leben schwer gemacht hat, wäre sie vielleicht zu etwas zu gebrauchen gewesen. Leider, war das nicht der Fall. Also beschloss ich, die Station bei der ersten sich bietenden Gelegenheit zu verlassen, um die Arbeit von mir und Nuncius nicht zu gefährden. Diese Gelegenheit wart Ihr."
languages.original_text: "If Tecla-Paradigm-13 had approached research with the same zeal she applied to making my life on the station more difficult, she could have been useful for something. Unfortunately, that was not the case. I decided to leave the station at the earliest opportunity, so as not to jeopardise my and Nuncius's efforts. That opportunity turned out to be you."

Leider, war das nicht der Fall. Also beschloss ich, die Station bei der ersten sich bietenden Gelegenheit zu verlassen, um die Arbeit von mir und Nuncius nicht zu gefährden. Diese Gelegenheit wart Ihr."

languages.text: 「もしテクラ・パラダイム13号が、ステーションでの私の生活を困難にするのと同じ熱意で研究に取り組んでいたら、彼女は何かの役に立てたかもしれない。残念ながら、そうはならなかった。私は、私とヌンシウスの努力を危険にさらさないよう、早いうちにステーションを去ることにした。その機会があなただったのです」。
languages.original_text: "If Tecla-Paradigm-13 had approached research with the same zeal she applied to making my life on the station more difficult, she could have been useful for something. Unfortunately, that was not the case. I decided to leave the station at the earliest opportunity, so as not to jeopardise my and Nuncius's efforts. That opportunity turned out to be you."

languages.text: "Tecla-Paradigm-13; istasyondaki hayatımı zorlaştırmak için uyguladığı şevkin aynısını araştırmalarıma gösterseydi bir sonuç elde edebilirdik. Ne yazık ki öyle olmadı ama. Nuncius'la verdiğimiz emeği tehlikeye atmamak için ilk fırsatta istasyondan ayrılmaya karar verdim. O fırsatı siz sağladınız."
languages.original_text: "If Tecla-Paradigm-13 had approached research with the same zeal she applied to making my life on the station more difficult, she could have been useful for something. Unfortunately, that was not the case. I decided to leave the station at the earliest opportunity, so as not to jeopardise my and Nuncius's efforts. That opportunity turned out to be you."
